–Also called ZAREAH and ZOREAH
–A city of the tribe of Dan or possibly the tribe of JudahJos 15:33;19:41
–The city of SamsonJud 13:2,24,25;16:31
–Representatives of the tribe of Dan sent from, to spy out the 
land with a view to its conquestJud 18
–Fortified by Rehoboam2Ch 11:10
–Re-populated after the captivityNe 11:29
